Summary: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction
Description: Run a 4-week POC to introduce AI-assisted workflows in DevOps for incident triage and CI/CD risk analysis, with strict human control and zero autonomous infrastructure execution. Business value: faster MTTA/MTTR, better release confidence, standardized quality, safe AI adoption. Constraints: AI advisory only, no autonomous infra actions, mandatory human review, no secrets/PII in prompts. Epic acceptance: baseline vs post-POC comparison, measurable triage improvement (>=15% preferred), zero critical policy violations, Go/No-Go decision documented.
Epic Name: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Define AI usage policy and guardrails for DevOps POC
Description: Create and approve a one-page policy defining allowed/prohibited AI usage, data handling rules, human approval requirements, and escalation path. Acceptance criteria: approved by DevOps Lead and Security reviewer; explicit no autonomous infra action clause; prompt data rules documented (no secrets/PII); violation escalation process defined.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Implement mandatory human review checklist for AI-assisted recommendations
Description: Publish and enforce a checklist to validate safety, evidence, security, and approval before any action. Acceptance criteria: checklist published and shared with on-call rotation; includes safety/evidence/security/post-action checks; linked in incident workflow and runbooks; compliance tracked per incident.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Capture baseline metrics before POC rollout
Description: Collect last 2-4 weeks baseline metrics to compare POC impact. Acceptance criteria: baseline report with MTTA, MTTR, triage time; data sources documented; metric definitions aligned with stakeholders.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Configure pilot scope with services and recurring scenarios
Description: Select 1 critical and 1 medium-impact service, and define 2 recurring incident scenarios for pilot. Acceptance criteria: services and scenarios documented; initial severity boundary defined (start low/medium); pilot owners assigned; rollback/stop criteria documented.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Publish approved prompt templates for incident and CI/CD workflows
Description: Create standardized templates: triage, hypothesis, handoff, postmortem, release risk briefing. Acceptance criteria: template library published; output format enforces evidence-first responses; insufficient-evidence behavior included; team orientation completed.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Run AI-assisted incident workflow in pilot operations
Description: Integrate AI-assisted triage into incident flow while keeping execution manual. Acceptance criteria: workflow validated in at least one simulation; applied in pilot incidents where applicable; human checklist completed for each AI-assisted recommendation; incident updates include evidence-backed output.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Pilot AI-assisted CI pipeline failure triage
Description: Use AI to summarize failing jobs and suggest likely causes/manual checks. All changes follow PR review and release gate. Acceptance criteria: AI triage applied to selected CI failures; suggested changes submitted via Bitbucket PR; no auto-merge for AI-suggested changes; release gate checks risk and rollback readiness; time-to-diagnose tracked.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Create POC KPI dashboard and review cadence
Description: Set dashboard and routine for weekly operations and biweekly governance reviews. Acceptance criteria: dashboard includes MTTA, MTTR, triage time, usefulness rate; includes checklist compliance and policy violations; includes CI/CD triage KPI; review cadence scheduled and owners assigned.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Launch weekly predictive risk briefing for pilot services
Description: Implement assistive predictive risk briefing with risk level, drivers, and manual preventive actions. Acceptance criteria: weekly briefing generated for pilot services; includes risk level, top drivers, confidence, data gaps; no automatic remediation triggered; recall/false-positive/lead-time tracked.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction

Summary: Complete POC retrospective and Go/No-Go decision
Description: Assess outcomes versus baseline and targets; decide scale, adjust, or stop. Acceptance criteria: final report comparing baseline vs POC outcomes; risks/issues and corrective actions documented; formal Go/No-Go decision recorded; Phase-2 backlog prepared if Go.
Epic Link: AI-Assisted DevOps POC for Incident Response and CI/CD Risk Reduction
